scope_boundary: Public-safe Project Theseus book-to-Theseus crosswalk pointer import only. The sanitized fixture records a pinned dirty-checkout report digest, 53 public-safe pointer rows, 20 backlog cards, 134 source-sync review decisions, 9 changed AI-book source files, 0 removed source files, 0 stale phases, 0 missing source-basis rows, 0 done phases missing evidence, 0 public training rows, 0 external inference calls, 0 fallback returns, and ten expected-invalid controls. It does not copy the raw crosswalk report or private paths, does not rerun Project Theseus, does not prove clean live Project Theseus replay, and does not create an upward support-state transition.
transition_reason: The crosswalk import is useful because it makes the two-way book/Theseus parity surface reviewable by digest, counts, smoke-gate fields, and negative controls. It remains pointer-only: it records that Theseus has a public-safe crosswalk report pointing back to the book and backlog cards, not that any referenced Theseus result is cleanly replayed, independently reviewed, or strong enough to promote the Project Theseus chapter core claim.
required_artifacts: clean Project Theseus replay from a public-safe checkout or archived public release fixture
environment notes and exact replay command for any stronger crosswalk lane
publication permission or redaction record for any raw crosswalk artifact
artifact-truth review for referenced Theseus evidence rows
missing-artifact closure or durable gap ledger with reviewer acceptance
negative_results: clean live Project Theseus replay remains unclaimed
source checkout was dirty at import time
raw Project Theseus crosswalk report is not copied into this repository
private paths and private payloads remain redacted
all imported support rows stay pointer-only
no chapter core claim is promoted
no upward support-state transition is created
downgrade_triggers: raw report, private payload, private path, dogfood trace, checkpoint, prompt, test, solution, candidate-code, or training-row leakage
source-sync or public-safe evidence smoke failure
support-state promotion without a separate accepted transition
promotion_burden: Move above argument only for a narrowed Project Theseus implementation-reference claim after a clean public-safe replay or archived public fixture, environment notes, publication-permission closure, artifact-truth review for referenced rows, missing-artifact closure, independent review, and a separate accepted upward transition. Pointer-only crosswalk evidence by itself blocks promotion.
limitations: dirty local source checkout at import time
raw crosswalk report not copied into the public repository
no clean live Project Theseus replay
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; not an independent Project Theseus, benchmark, model-quality, verifier-quality, source-interpretation, artifact-truth, or external safety audit
acceptance_blockers: dirty source checkout at import time
non_claims: does not promote Project Theseus above argument

does not prove clean live Project Theseus replay, deployed Theseus behavior, model quality, benchmark superiority, generation speed, useful-solution-per-second improvement, support-state movement, or self-evolution safety
does not create an upward support-state transition
does not promote the Project Theseus chapter core claim
does not promote any chapter core claim
